column5: How to calculate our data on sheet1?
Estimate latency per packet = 1 / packets_received (per second)
packets received are shown in optical HTML server called: Packets received (since start)
packets CRC error (since start) / packets received (Kbits since start)
packets_sent + packet lost (since start) - packet_sent / packets_sent + packet lost (since start)
